title: CT4.N13 completed discharge record — Comparison theorem — does demand exceed capacity?
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT4.N13, the comparison node “Comparison theorem — does demand exceed capacity?” of tactic CT4 (Charging schemes). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT4.N13. It must be exactly `CT4`, selecting Charging schemes (charging) as the tactic that owns the comparison step “Comparison theorem — does demand exceed capacity?” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Comparison theorem — does demand exceed capacity?”. It must be exactly `CT4.N13` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT4.N13 within tactic CT4 (Charging schemes). It must be exactly 13, matching the N13 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT4.N13. It must be exactly `proved`, meaning that the node's mathematical assertion or construction has been established for the comparison obligation “Comparison theorem — does demand exceed capacity?”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT4.N13. The array must contain `S-Comp`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Comparison theorem — does demand exceed capacity?”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Comp` to occur in CT4.N13's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that places the estimates in a common comparison and records the resulting conclusion for the obligation “Comparison theorem — does demand exceed capacity?”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT4.N13 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Comp (comparison, comparisonKind, conclusionKind, conclusionRef, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Comp` evidence instance at CT4.N13. It must be exactly `S-Comp`, identifying the contract that places the estimates in a common comparison and records the resulting conclusion; the same instance must supply comparison, comparisonKind, conclusionKind, conclusionRef, evidence.

statement.informal: Prove or verify: Comparison theorem — does demand exceed capacity?

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
